menu_metadata.name: Espresso
menu_metadata.description: A concentrated, bold shot of pure coffee extracted under high pressure.

menu_metadata.name: Caramel Macchiato
menu_metadata.description: Freshly steamed milk with vanilla-flavored syrup, marked with espresso and topped with a decadent caramel drizzle.

menu_metadata.name: Oat Milk Cold Brew
menu_metadata.description: Our signature slow-steeped cold brew coffee balanced smoothly with rich, creamy oat milk.

faq.question: What are your operating hours?
faq.answer: We are open daily from 6:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

faq.question: Can I modify my drink order after confirming it?
faq.answer: Once an order status shifts to CONFIRMED, the order is instantly sent to the kitchen terminal for preparation and cannot be altered.
